chapter: Chapter 1: The First March on Rome (88-87 BCE)

questions.question: What was the Asian Vespers?
options: A religious festival honoring eastern gods in Rome
A coordinated massacre of Roman civilians ordered by Mithridates
A peace treaty between Rome and Pontus
A military campaign led by Sulla in Asia Minor

questions.question: What was the pomerium?
options: The sacred boundary of Rome that armed soldiers could not cross
The military oath sworn by Roman legionaries to their general
The formal declaration of war issued by the Roman Senate
The ceremonial robe worn by consuls during triumphs

questions.question: Who was the first Roman general to march his army against Rome itself?
What political faction did Marius represent?
What military command were Marius and Sulla fighting over?
options: The command against the Germanic tribes
The command against Jugurtha in Africa
The command against Mithridates in the East
The command against the Italian rebels

questions.question: Which tribune proposed legislation to transfer the eastern command from Sulla to Marius?
What happened to Marius after Sulla's first march on Rome?
options: He was appointed governor of Africa
He fled and became a fugitive

questions.question: Who were the Bardyiae?
options: Sulla's elite cavalry unit from the Social War
Marius's slave-soldiers who carried out massacres
Germanic mercenaries hired to defend Rome
Italian allies who supported Cinna's rebellion

questions.question: How many consulships did Marius ultimately hold?
What consul was killed sitting in his curule chair during the Marian massacres?
